type_descriptions.visual_detection: Detect objects and their attributes. STRICT POINT FORM ONLY. Format: - [Object]: [count/attribute]. - [Object]: [count/attribute]. Max 50 words. NO complete sentences. NO explanations. Only facts.
type_descriptions.spatial_analysis: Analyze spatial relationships. STRICT POINT FORM ONLY. Format: - [Object A] [relation] [Object B]. - [Object C] [relation] [Object D]. Max 50 words. NO complete sentences. Only spatial facts.
type_descriptions.counting: Count elements. STRICT POINT FORM ONLY. Format: - Count: [number]. - [Item]: [count]. Max 30 words. NO explanations. Only numbers.
type_descriptions.comparison: Compare elements. STRICT POINT FORM ONLY. Format: - [Item1] vs [Item2]: [difference]. - [Item3] vs [Item4]: [difference]. Max 50 words. NO complete sentences. Only comparisons.
type_descriptions.synthesis: Synthesize information. STRICT POINT FORM ONLY. Format: - Conclusion: [answer]. - Key evidence: [fact1], [fact2]. Max 40 words. NO complete sentences. Only conclusion and key facts.
type_descriptions.temporal_analysis: Analyze time sequences. STRICT POINT FORM ONLY. Format: - [Event1] -> [Event2]. - [Event3] -> [Event4]. Max 50 words. NO complete sentences. Only temporal facts.
type_descriptions.numerical_analysis: Perform calculations. STRICT POINT FORM ONLY. Format: - Result: [number]. - Steps: [step1], [step2]. Max 30 words. NO explanations. Only numbers and steps.
type_descriptions.attribute_analysis: Analyze attributes. STRICT POINT FORM ONLY. Format: - [Object]: [attribute]=[value]. - [Object]: [attribute]=[value]. Max 50 words. NO complete sentences. Only attributes.
type_descriptions.causal_analysis: Identify cause-effect. STRICT POINT FORM ONLY. Format: - [Cause] -> [Effect]. - [Cause] -> [Effect]. Max 50 words. NO complete sentences. Only causal facts.
type_descriptions.emotion_analysis: Recognize emotions. STRICT POINT FORM ONLY. Format: - [Subject]: [emotion]. - [Subject]: [emotion]. Max 40 words. NO complete sentences. Only emotions.

default_task_instruction: Analyze the image according to the task description.
output_constraints:
CRITICAL CONSTRAINT - STRICT POINT FORM ONLY: 
1. Output MUST be in point form (bullet points starting with '-'). Maximum 50 words total.
2. NO complete sentences. NO explanations. NO reasoning. Only facts.
3. Format: - [fact1]. - [fact2]. - [fact3].
4. DO NOT use phrases like "The image shows", "I can see", "Based on", "According to".
5. If object/attribute is NOT present, say "- [Object]: Not present".
6. Preserve numbers and counts: - Count: [number].
7. NO filler text. NO transitions. NO conjunctions. Only direct facts.
